title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIO SAN ISIDRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIBOJOC, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1656 / 65 OG No. 8, 1810 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4987, June 01, 1967 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO SAN ISIDRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIBOJOC, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sitios Taytay, Datag, Saon and Kabulihan, in Barrio Tinibgan, Municipality of Maribojoc, Province of Bohol, are separated from said barrio, and constituted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as Barrio San Isidro.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 1, 1967.
